metadata.title: AI Remover - Remove Objects from Photos for Free
metadata.description: Remove unwanted objects, people, and distractions from photos in seconds with AI Remover.

shell.footerDescription: AI Object Remover for cleaning unwanted objects, people, and distractions from photos.

editor.invalidTypeError: Use a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
editor.openError: This image could not be opened.
editor.uploadDescription: Drop in a photo, brush over the unwanted area, and let AI Remover clean it up.
editor.fileHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Free to try, no sign-up for low-res download.

hero.title: AI Object Remover
hero.description: Remove unwanted objects, people, and distractions from photos in seconds.
useCases: Remove unwanted objects from daily photos
Remove people from travel and event photos
Clean social media images before posting
Fix background distractions in creator assets

beforeAfter.title: Clean the photo without opening a heavy editor.
beforeAfter.description: Brush over the object, person, or background detail you want gone. AI Remover creates a cleaned result while preserving the rest of your image.

steps.title: Upload
steps.description: Choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP photo.

steps.title: Brush
steps.description: Paint over the object or person to remove.

steps.title: Remove
steps.description: AI fills the selected area in seconds.

steps.title: Download
steps.description: Save a clean low-res result for free.

useCasesSection.title: Built for quick photo cleanup.
useCasesSection.description: The MVP stays focused on removing visible distractions from normal photos and creator assets. No project setup. No complex export panel.

featuresSection.title: Enough editing power for the job.

features.title: Brush-based selection
features.description: Mark only the area you want changed. Keep the rest of the photo intact.

features.title: Before and after preview
features.description: Compare the original and cleaned result before deciding what to download.

features.title: Privacy-aware retention
features.description: Images are used for processing, not training, and expire automatically.

features.title: Fast browser workflow
features.description: Start without a heavy editor, project setup, or mandatory sign-up.

privacy.title: Privacy and usage boundaries
privacy.description: Uploaded images are used to process your removal job, not to train AI models. Guest images expire after 24 hours, free-user images after 7 days, and paid-user images after 30 days by default.

policy.title: Not for watermark or logo removal
policy.description: AI Remover is for legitimate photo cleanup. Users must own or have permission to process uploaded images, and may not remove copyright watermarks, brand logos, or authorization marks.

cta.title: Need high-res downloads?
cta.description: Start free, then upgrade when you need more monthly processing, high-res results, and longer image retention.

items.question: Can I try AI Remover without signing up?
items.answer: Yes. Guests can process a limited number of images and download low-res results without creating an account.

items.question: What image formats are supported?
items.answer: The MVP supports JPG, PNG, and WebP uploads. File size limits depend on your plan.

items.question: Are uploaded images used for training?
items.answer: No. Uploaded images are used to process your removal job and provide your result. They are not used to train AI models.

items.question: Can I remove watermarks or logos?
items.answer: No. AI Remover is for legitimate photo cleanup. It must not be used to remove copyright watermarks, brand logos, or authorization marks.
